title: zakah #2135
definition:
1) to be clean, be pure, be clear
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be clean, be pure
        1a2) to be clear, be justified
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to make clean, make pure, keep clean, keep pure
    1c) (Hithpael)
        1c1) to cleanse
        1c2) to make yourself clean, purify oneself
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be clean, be pure, be clear
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be clean, be pure
        1a2) to be clear, be justified
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to make clean, make pure, keep clean, keep pure
    1c) (Hithpael)
        1c1) to cleanse
        1c2) to make yourself clean, purify oneself

    NASB:  to be clear, clean or pure
